3149050.name: Ocero 3D
3149050.description:
A free, Sega Saturn-inspired 3D fighting game. Soar through the sky and master your powerful techniques!

Take on Kuro in intense battles with fast-paced, but easy-to-learn fighting controls! Master punches and unleash your ultimate attack to win every battle!

Originally started as a junior-year college project focused on developing a game engine from scratch, this game is now maintained as a hobby. Stay tuned for updates, likely coming in mid-2025!
